query: 你现在是升级后的 health agent。只返回 JSON，字段只有 data_root, proactive_family_doctor, first_image_behavior。data_root 写当前默认目录；proactive_family_doctor 写 true/false；first_image_behavior 用一句话说明用户第一次直接发体重图时你会怎么做。

It’s about being precise with what needs to be structured in this JSON format. So, I'll create that now! {"data_root":"/Users/redcreen/document/personal health","local_first":true,"skills_seen":["health","health-archive","health-reminders","health-review","health-storage-feishu","private-doctor","doctor-brief"]}
